description: v1.3.0 perf baseline. Captured against the two-cluster federation fixture (kubeatlas-prod + kubeatlas-staging kind clusters, each loaded with the stress-test-5k generator). The federation endpoints are the v1.3 addition; single-cluster numbers are unchanged from v1.2.0 and continue to live in perf-baseline-v1.2.json. The federation/graph latency reflects the cost of serialising a flat union of every resource and intra-cluster edge across the named members — at ~15K nodes and ~26K edges the JSON marshal dominates; a paginated or streaming federation read is a likely v1.3.x candidate.

captured_on.runtime: kubeatlas binary, KUBEATLAS_BACKEND=memory, multicluster.enabled=true, two kind clusters via Docker Desktop on WSL2
